name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed payment deadlines cause late fees. We send automated reminders instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Etsy sellers frequently miss payment deadlines, resulting in late fees and lost discounts.
features: manual entry of vendor payment terms
dashboard for tracking upcoming payment deadlines
